name: True or False Game 26
description: Test your erudition and intuition in this addictive quiz! You have to dive into a world of amazing facts and decide whether to believe what is written or not. We have collected 300 unique questions from various fields: astronomy, biology, history, geography, and anatomy. Your main task is to find out where the truth is hidden and where the statement is actually false. It is a great brain workout that will help you learn many new things and have fun. Compete with yourself, score points, and become a real expert!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
